A '''battle''' took place on [[Dagu]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during which [[High General]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] battled a [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] named [[Artel Darc]].

==The battles==
[[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] was accompanying a large group of [[Cloning|clones]] when they were captured and imprisoned on the swamp [[Planet|world]], [[Dagu]]. While one of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] most cunning [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Acolytes]], [[Artel Darc]], controlled the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems|Separatist]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]], Shaak Ti was able to disguise [[Gender/Legends|her]] identity as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and laid low amongst her fellow [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. In the depths of the prison, Ti began a revolt against the Separatists, aided by clones and the enslaved natives, the [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]].<ref name="EfD">''[[Escape from Dagu]]''</ref>
